Groundwater & \textasciitilde 1.4M & 2015–2024 & Quarterly, District & water\textbackslash \_level \\

% Global Model Performance Comparison (5-Fold TimeSeries CV)
\begin{table}[htbp]
\centering
\caption{Global Model Performance Comparison (5-Fold TimeSeries CV)}
\label{tab:model_comp}
\small
\begin{tabular}{lcccc}
\toprule
Model & R2 & RMSE & MAPE & Significance \\
\midrule
Naive Baseline & -0.050 ± 0.044 & 58.32 ± 10.27 & 83.10\% ± 8.70\% & (p=4.962e-03) \\
Ridge & -0.023 ± 0.029 & 57.38 ± 8.82 & 88.35\% ± 10.82\% & (p=2.338e-55) \\
Random Forest & 0.925 ± 0.048 & 14.45 ± 4.51 & 12.07\% ± 2.87\% & (Best Model) \\
XGBoost & 0.921 ± 0.055 & 14.64 ± 4.66 & 11.61\% ± 3.17\% & (p=3.622e-14) \\
LightGBM & 0.921 ± 0.053 & 14.72 ± 4.58 & 11.90\% ± 2.89\% & (p=3.668e-18) \\
LSTM (Keras) & 0.008 ± 0.779 & 51.56 ± 19.54 & 66.37\% ± 39.95\% & (p=4.143e-09) \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
